text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Groove. I was going through some clothes
that my parents sent me, and I think some of
them would look perfect on you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Um, I really don't think that would suit me very
well...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, it can't hurt to give it a try! Just this once!
You'll do it for me, right? Great!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: H-hold on, I never said I would! Ugh, fine. Have it your way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can't... fit inside? Impossible... Have I put on
weight?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's true that I've been too lax with my
training recently...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I need to talk with my trainer and request a more
strenuous regimen.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Groove! Come back! I just
noticed—these are from when I was a little girl!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She didn't hear me... Oh well, I'll tell her when she
comes back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although it may have begun as a
misunderstanding, Air Groove's new regimen
nonetheless has the desired effect.
